UG-84  CHARPY IMPACT TEST REQUIREMENTS. (a) Impact testing shall be performed when required by this paragraph or by the specific material requirements of UCS-56, UCS-66, or UCS-67. (b) Test specimens shall be prepared and tested in accordance with UCS-68. Test temperature shall be at or below the minimum design metal temperature as determined in UCS-66. (c) Acceptance criteria shall be as specified in this paragraph. Materials failing the impact test may be retested, subject to the provisions of this paragraph. For exemption from impact testing, see UCS-66 and UCS-67. Refer to UCS-57 for specimen size and orientation requirements. Test results shall be documented as required by UG-93.
